so too doth each passing year unveil new beauty yet unseen.”

Dress Code

Garden Party Chic

Please come in colors inspired by a summer garden

Pomegranate
Terracotta
Dusty Rose
Sage Green
Moss Green
Warm Ivory

Ladies’ Attire

  • Flowy maxi dress or midi dress
  • Floral prints or solid colors
  • Light, breathable fabrics
  • Elegant, relaxed, and feminine

Gentlemen’s Attire

  • Polo shirt or long sleeves
  • Linen or cotton fabrics
  • Pants or chinos
  • Loafers or dress shoes
The Celebration

The Oasis at Florentina Homes

Step into an evening of blooming beauty, warm candlelight, and timeless celebration.

Getting there: The Oasis at Florentina Homes, Bantayan, Dumaguete City.
Kindly Respond

RSVP

A Kindly Requested Reply

As we prepare for this special evening, we kindly ask for your response to help us arrange every detail with care and ensure a memorable celebration for all.

Please let us know whether you will be joining us. Your reply will assist us in preparing seating and dining accommodations for our cherished guests.

Thank you for being part of this beautiful milestone.

Will you be attending?
We Can’t Wait to Celebrate With You

With Love, The Borling Family
